scripts.test:emulator:participant: npm run functions:build && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-citiwalk --only auth,firestore,functions "node tests/firebase-flow.integration.mjs"
scripts.test:emulator:admin: npm run functions:build && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-citiwalk --only auth,firestore,functions "node functions/tests/admin-flow.integration.cjs"
scripts.test:emulator:delete: npm run functions:build && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-citiwalk --only auth,firestore,functions "node functions/tests/admin-delete.smoke.cjs"
scripts.test:emulator:logs: npm run functions:build && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-citiwalk --only auth,firestore,functions "node functions/tests/admin-logs.smoke.cjs"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run functions:build
scripts.build:production: npm run validate:production && npm run build:all
